title: Mesh per-drone EGS-link status event (v1, locked 2026-05-10)
description: Published on Redis channel mesh.link_status whenever a drone's link to the EGS transitions, either by geometric range crossing (mesh.egs_link_range_meters) or by a scripted egs_link_drop / egs_link_restore event. Drones subscribe and flip their standalone bit on receipt; the dashboard uses the same stream for the EGS LINK SEVERED banner.

t.description: Scenario tick at the moment of the transition.

reason.description: Why the transition fired. 'geometric' = drone crossed egs_link_range; 'scripted' = sim.scripted_events override; 'heartbeat' = periodic re-emit for liveness.
